title: PvP Perfect
description: A Modpack Trying To Be Unique: Gives Great Performance Whilst Still Keeping The Must Have Mods for Your PvP In Mind.
body:
# PvP Perfect 

This isn't just your regular optimization modpack. It's specifically aimed at the PvP community. Not only does it include great optimization mods, but it also comes with essential PvP mods like [Shield Fixes](https://modrinth.com/mod/complete-shield-fixes), [Combat Hitboxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/combat-hitboxes/versions), and more. This already makes the modpack unique, as the most popular packs often overlook PvP, while less known ones tend to have way too many mods that hurt performance and waste resources. This pack also provides preconfigured settings for Sodium and other mods, essential shaders, basic resource packs, and a prepaired server list of the top practive PvP servers.

<details>
<summary>Benchmarks</summary>

*This is all in-game test in PvP Club Duels while on 1.21.8 of this modpack. Going to singleplayer or going to other modpack versions (Like 1.21.4) has and will raise FPS greatly.*

- System 1: Intel i7-7700T, IGPU, 8GB DDR4 - **180 FPS**.
- System 2: Intel i3-N305, IGPU, 8GB DDR4 - **220 FPS**.
- System 3: Intel i5-120U, IGPU, 16GB DDR4 - **250 FPS**.
- System 4: Ryzen 3550H, 1080 Laptop, 32GB DDR4 - **260 FPS**.
- System 5: Ryzen 5 8640HS, 760M, 8GB DDR5 - **310 FPS**.
- System 6: Intel i5-13420H, 2050, 16GB DDR5 - **340 FPS**.
- System 7: Ryzen 5 4500, Arc B570, 16GB DDR4 - **360 FPS**.
- System 8: Ryzen 5 7535HS, 4060 Laptop, 16GB DDR5 - **470 FPS**.
- System 9: Ryzen 5900X, 3060 TI, 16GB DDR4 - **730 FPS**.
- System 10: Intel 13400F, 4060, 32GB DDR5 - **830 FPS**.
- System 11: Ryzen 5 7600, 4060 Ti, 32GB DDR5 - **930 FPS**.
- System 13: Ryzen 7 8700f, 5060, 16GB DDR5 - **1100 FPS**.
- System 14: Ryzen 7 7800x3D, 4070 Super, 32GB DDR5 - **1150 FPS**.
- System 15: Ryzen 9950x3D, 5090, 64GB DDR5 - **1770 FPS**. (System used for gallery images)
- **More to be added. volunteers allowed!**

**All benchmarks are real results performed by actual actual people.**

</details>

*If you want to leave a personal benchmark, please click the 'Report Issues' under links.*

### Auto-Disabled Mods:
*These are auto-disabled for players that do not want specific things or do not need the extra little details that can add bloat resulting in more RAM usage/start up times.*

- [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers) **Enable to make players look much better but this may reduce preformance slightly**
- [Animatium](https://modrinth.com/mod/animatium) **Enable for 1.8 legacy animations**
- [BetterHurtCam](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterhurtcam) **Enable if you want more settings for hurt cam past built in accessibility settings**
- [Chat Patches](https://modrinth.com/mod/chatpatches) **Enable for chat features**
- [Gamma Utils](https://modrinth.com/mod/gamma-utils) **Enable if Visible Barriers fullbright doesnt work**
- [MinecraftCapes](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraftcapes) **Enable to see and use custom capes but beware that some players may use inappropriate capes**
- [Shield Statuses](https://modrinth.com/mod/shield-statuses) **Enable if you want to see if shields are actually up**
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) **Enable for Voice Chat**
- [Smooth Scrolling](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-scroll) **Enable for smooth hotbar swapping, smooth chat animations, etc)**
- [Tier Tagger](https://modrinth.com/mod/tiertagger) **Enable to see player tiers from [MCTIERS](https://mctiers.com/rankings/overall)/[SubTiers]([https://pvptiers.com/](https://subtiers.net/ranking/overall)) in game**
> - [ViaFabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/viafabric) **Enable all 3 Via mods for swapping versions**
> - [ViaVersion](https://modrinth.com/plugin/viaversion) **Enable all 3 Via mods for swapping versions**
> - [ViaBackwards](https://modrinth.com/plugin/viabackwards) **Enable all 3 Via mods for swapping versions**
- [voxy](https://modrinth.com/mod/voxy) **Enable if you want to have higher chunk view distances with slight performance cost, only 1.21.6+**

> **Count: 14**

</details>

## Trouble Shooting

<details>
<summary>Fullbright</summary>

Do /Visiblebarriers fullbright true. If not working in public servers, turn up brightness in sodium settings to max, then if still not working you can turn off smooth lighting in video settings/quality. If nothing works past this, revert your settings and just enable Gamma Utils.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Particles/Animations</summary>

First make sure particles is not set to minimal in video settings/quality. If set on decreased or all and still not showing you can go to video settings/particals and manually enable/disable your choice of particals. Same for animations, go to video settings/animations and select your choices.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Crashing</summary>

First, If you select wrong Java Arguments for your PC or is just incombatible, this can cause some crashing. Second, Make sure you did not add any more mods outside of what comes in the pack. If nothing changed then read the fabric message or read the crash log. If hard to understand you can just ask a friend or send it to a clanker to read. Third, If you cant get a clear answer simply install [Crash Assistant](https://modrinth.com/mod/crash-assistant) then when it crashes read the logs it gives. If you still dont understand the logs you can forward it to the Crash Assistant Discord and get help from someone who understands minecraft modding well. Finally, if your issues are specifically with this modpack please report crash logs/any helpful information so I can personally try to fix for future versions. If you do not know where to put the logs please go to the [Report Issues](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSccW7Qg5GG_iOd5u8V6M_BLErNCjxRKCdmUq19NUCwDP4yTtQ/viewform?usp=sharing&ouid=102941755855241621448) link.

</details>

<details>
<summary>jdk.incubator</summary>

If you see a error like this: 


<details>
<summary>ErrorPreview</summary>

![ErrorPreview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b619470151ef01f26492a83232e8485297c55b27_0.webp)

</details>

Simply add ( **--add-modules jdk.incubator.vector** ) to your Java arguments.

</details>

## DISCLAIMERS

**This pack isn't made for *just* FPS.** This modpack aims for a balance of high FPS, PvP ready performance, a great single player experience, compatibility, and most importantly, stability. Many packs boost FPS at the cost of poor stability, which can lead to stutters, lower 1% lows, unreasonable workloads, and issues with other tasks like sharing your screen on Discord.

The latest version is **NOT** the best for FPS. From my testing, 1.21.4 (3900 FPS) gets about 47% more FPS then 1.21.8 (2650 FPS. Performs equally to 1.21.11). This was tested in a singeplayer superflat void. If you want more FPS then downgrade to 1.21.4. *Tested on modpack version 0.2.1, performance can and will increase with later versions*
